evals.prompt: Audit my Zotero library for duplicate DOIs.
evals.expected_behavior: Read dedup_index + local Zotero API; produce duplicate-DOI section of curation report; suggest keep/merge/trash per group; never call delete/update directly.

evals.prompt: Find Zotero items missing required tags / DOI.
evals.expected_behavior: Compare each item's tags against required hub-tag set (research-hub + cluster/<slug>); list keys missing tags; suggest `research-hub zotero backfill --tags`.
List top tags by count, low-count tags, near-duplicate candidates; defer renames to manual review or zotero-skills batch update.

evals.prompt: Propose a Zotero cleanup plan I can review before applying.
evals.expected_behavior: Emit full preview report (duplicates + orphan tags + mismatches + bloat) with explicit follow-up commands; never executes any change directly.
